Keywords: sm md lg xl 2xl tailwind viewport min-width progressive
Description: Start with narrow layout then enhance with min-width media queries; align with Tailwind defaults (640/768/1024/1280/1536).
Do: Base styles for mobile; add md: lg: as needed
Code Example Bad: hidden lg:block only // no mobile base

Description: Let components respond to their parent width; use inline-size containment and named containers when helpful.
Do: container-type: inline-size on wrapper; @container (min-width: …) for layout shifts
Don't: Rely on viewport only for reusable cards

Description: Scale type between min/max with clamp() or fluid tokens; reduces jumpy breakpoint-only font sizes.
Don't: Fixed px headings across all widths
Code Example Good: text style via clamp or --text-* fluid vars

Description: Padding and gap can use clamp() or token scales so density adapts smoothly.
Do: Use fluid space tokens or clamp for section padding
Don't: Same fixed padding on phone and desktop

Description: Grids that wrap by available width without hard column counts at each breakpoint.
Use flex for nav bars; stack on narrow; row when space allows with flex-wrap or breakpoint/container.
Don't: fixed horizontal scroll nav on mobile

Description: Full-height layouts: prefer 100dvh or min-height dvh to avoid mobile browser UI jump; svh/lvh when semantic.
Use srcset/sizes or picture for crops; lazy below fold; eager for LCP.
Do: sizes matching layout; webp/avif when possible
Don't: One huge image for all viewports

Description: Horizontal scroll with min-width or card rows on small screens; preserve header semantics on desktop.
Do: overflow-x-auto + min-w or md:table + mobile cards

Description: Collapsible nav on small screens; visible horizontal on large; keyboard and aria-expanded.
Do: button aria-controls aria-expanded; focus trap in drawer if modal
Code Example Bad: nav with no menu on mobile

Description: Interactive controls meet ~44px minimum; spacing between tappable elements.
Code Example Bad: w-6 h-6 icon button no label

Description: Break where content needs room not only by device names; use ch/rem widths when fitting text.
Use inline/block and logical properties for spacing and borders for i18n and consistent axes.
Don't: start/end mixed with left/right only in LTR-specific cases

Description: Enhance with @supports(container-type) or grid; provide simpler fallback.
Do: @supports for container queries with media fallback

Description: Prevent stray overflow: min-w-0 on flex children; overflow-x-auto only where intended.
Do: min-w-0 on flex items; contain wide content
Code Example Bad: flex child with long unbroken string no min-w-0
